# Let's load the JSON file to inspect structure and find the canonical text.
import json, os, sys
path = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
len(data), type(data)

# search for exact substring in ayah_text fields
matches = []
for entry in data:
    text = entry.get('ayah_text', '')
    if "يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا" in text or "يَجْعَل لَهُ مَخْرَجًا" in text:
        matches.append(entry)
len(matches)

# Define normalization function for Arabic
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]""")
tatweel = "\u0640"
def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s.strip()
    # remove diacritics/vowel marks
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace(tatweel, '')
    # unify hamza: map various hamzas to bare hamza 'ء' maybe, but we'll map to 'ا'??? The instruction says unify hamza; choose to map other forms to a standard 'ء'
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A]', '', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
    return s.lower()

target_full = "وَمَنْ يَتَّقِ اللهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"
norm_target = normalize_arabic(target_full)
norm_target, target_full

# search normalized for parts
part1 = normalize_arabic("وَمَنْ يَتَّقِ اللهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا")
part2 = normalize_arabic("وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ")
matches1 = [e for e in data if part1 in normalize_arabic(e.get('ayah_text',''))]
matches2 = [e for e in data if part2 in normalize_arabic(e.get('ayah_text',''))]
len(matches1), len(matches2)

# Build candidate from matches
ayah2 = matches1[0]
ayah3 = matches2[0]
cand_text = ayah2['ayah_text'] + " " + ayah3['ayah_text']
cand_text, ayah2['ayah_id'], ayah3['ayah_id']

ayah2_text = ayah2['ayah_text']
ayah3_text = ayah3['ayah_text']
print("Ayah2:", ayah2_text)
print("Ayah3:", ayah3_text)
# find index of substring "وَمَنْ"
substr = "وَمَنْ"
ayah2_text.find(substr)

start_idx = ayah2_text.find("وَمَنْ")
slice1 = ayah2_text[start_idx:]
# find end position in ayah3 up to 'يَحْتَسِبُ'
end_sub = "يَحْتَسِبُ"
end_idx = ayah3_text.find(end_sub)
slice2 = ayah3_text[:end_idx+len(end_sub)]
slice1, slice2, slice1+ " " + slice2

# similarity metrics: token overlap F1
def token_f1(a,b):
    a_tokens = normalize_arabic(a).split()
    b_tokens = normalize_arabic(b).split()
    a_set = a_tokens
    b_set = b_tokens
    # compute overlap counts (multiset)
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(a_set)
    cb = Counter(b_set)
    overlap = sum((ca & cb).values())
    if len(a_tokens) + len(b_tokens) == 0:
        return 1.0
    precision = overlap / len(b_tokens)
    recall = overlap / len(a_tokens)
    if precision+recall == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return f1, overlap, len(a_tokens), len(b_tokens)

candidate = slice1 + " " + slice2
provided = "وَمَنْ يَتَّقِ اللهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ"
token_f1(candidate, provided)
